form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into tenth behind Martin Dol at Laval over 2850m in a 4yo race on March 11 at $199. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Miss De Baille at Meslay-du-Maine over 2875m in a 4yo race on March 17 at $4.60. Can build on that fine effort last start.

form.formComment: Recent form below what she is capable of. Last start 7th over 2200m at Vincennes well beaten by Mirmande Del Phedo in 4yo fillies race on April 3 at $11. The start before disqualified at Vire on March 18 over 2150m. Good enough to make amends in this line-up.
